themeCSS: svg { background-color: #ffffff !important; } .node rect, .node polygon, .node path, .node circle, .node ellipse { stroke: #000000 !important; fill: #ffffff !important; } .edgePath path { stroke: #000000 !important; } text, .messageText, .actor, .label, .edgeLabel, .nodeLabel { fill: #000000 !important; color: #000000 !important; }
